item.title: Honda SP 125 Price in Gadwal
item.description: <![CDATA[I have been using the Honda SP125 for some time now and overall I am satisfied with the bike. The engine is very smooth and silent, and the mileage is really good — around 60–65 km/l in city riding. It is perfect for daily office use and long-term reliability.The bike feels comfortable for both rider and pillion, and the digital meter and silent start feature are very useful. Maintenance cost is also low compared to other bikes in this segment.Only small drawbacks are average tyre grip and the h...]]>

item.title: Tunwal Alfa Pro On Road Price in Gadwal
item.description:
<![CDATA[What is the Tunwal Alfa Pro on-road price Gadwal? The on-road price of the base variant of Tunwal Alfa Pro in Gadwal is Rs 64,323.
What is the price of Tunwal Alfa Pro top variant? The top variant of Tunwal Alfa Pro is Lithium Ion 30Ah - 12 Inch and the on-road price is Rs 90,005.
What is the insurance cost of the Tunwal Alfa Pro in Gadwal? The insurance cost of the base variant of Tunwal Alfa Pro in Gadwal is Rs. 3,435.
What is the Ex-showroom price of Tunwal Alfa Pro in Gadwal? The Ex-showr...]]>

item.title: Hero Xtreme 125R Price in Gadwal
item.description: <![CDATA[The Hero Xtreme 125R Dual Disc (often referring to the variant with dual-channel ABS or dual disc setup in higher trims) has been a refreshing ride in the 125cc segment. From the moment I took delivery, its aggressive, sporty styling grabbed attention—sharp lines, LED headlamp, muscular tank, and that bold stance make it look premium, almost like a downsized naked bike. It stands out on Indian roads, especially in black or matte finishes, turning heads during commutes.The 124.7cc air-cooled engi...]]>
